calibration.zh: 手摇归零:刀盘完全闭合(听金属摩擦声)=零点->逆时针到目标刻度
calibration.en: Hand zero: close burrs (metal friction)=zero->counter-clockwise to target

calibration.zh: 同C40:刀盘闭合=零点->数圈数
calibration.en: Same as C40: burrs closed=zero->count turns

calibration.zh: 归零同上,以刻度数为准
calibration.en: Zero as above; use click number

calibration.zh: 调到刻度1->拧松旋钮螺丝(2个)->开机顺时针至轻微摩擦->逆时针微调到零界->锁死(Matt Perger'白板笔标记法'需查官方/社区)
calibration.en: Set to 1->loosen dial screws(2)->powered, close to light friction->open a hair to zero->lock (Matt Perger 'marker method' needs official/community lookup)

espresso.zh: 零点以上数格范围调整

calibration.zh: 找零点(刀盘接触)->以此为基准在意式范围调;改度盘后需校准
calibration.en: Find zero (burrs touch)->set espresso range; recalibrate after dial swap

calibration.zh: 螺纹较粗,1档差较大;按杯况微调;Baratza有官方校准视频
calibration.en: Coarse thread, 1 step = big jump; tune per cup; Baratza has official videos
